Score.description: Points per 100 possessions, adjusted for scoring efficiency.

Iso.description: Isolation playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

PnR.description: Pick & Roll Ball Handler playtype score, accounting for volume and efficiency.

Pass.description: Assists per 100 possessions, adjusted for passing efficiency (AST vs TOV).

QuickDecision.description: Decision-Making score, accounting for assists per pass made, points per touch, and seconds per touch; rewards players with high impact and low time per touch.

DualThreat.description: Ability to attack defenses as both a scoring and playmaking threat simultaneously.

Pressure.description: Ability to pressure the rim through drives or post-ups.

RimPressure.description: Ability to pressure rim, accounting for drives/post-ups per touch and efficiency.
